summary: Fixed-window moving average filter for sensor data smoothing.

window_size.description: Number of samples in the averaging window (must be power of 2 for efficiency)

smooth_sensor.description: Apply moving average filter to smooth noisy sensor readings

run: /* Use smoothed value for display or control */

notes: This is a software-only algorithm module with no hardware resource requirements.
Buffer memory is caller-provided — no dynamic allocation.
Window size determines smoothing amount: larger = smoother but more lag.
